name: Sleepy Hollow Golf Course
address: 2721 E Sleepy Hollow Cir, Wasilla, AK 99654
about: Sleepy Hollow Golf Course is a 9-hole par-3 course nestled in the mountains of Wasilla, Alaska. The course operates year-round, utilizing a GCQuad golf simulator during the winter months when the natural greens are closed. The facility offers both traditional outdoor golf and a modern indoor simulation experience, making it suitable for all seasons. Pricing is structured by the hour, accommodating up to four people per booking, and offers a relaxed, community-focused environment for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Powered by the award-winning GCQuad launch monitor, providing professional-grade accuracy
Affordable hourly rate pricing suitable for individuals and small groups
Operates year-round, providing a consistent golf experience regardless of weather
Located in a scenic mountain setting, offering beautiful views while playing

food_and_drink.notes: On-site pizza kitchen (The Headless Horseman) serves food, described as a neighborhood pizza kitchen.
No mention of alcohol service on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Voted 'Best Launch Monitor' by Golf Digest five years running

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The provided content does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue directly for information on rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site pizza kitchen (The Headless Horseman), suggesting outside food may not be necessary. There is no mention of a BYOB (bring your own beverage) policy.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not specify the duration for 18 holes. Since it is a par-3 course and the simulator is available, playing time would depend on the format chosen (e.g., full simulation or casual play).

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly. It offers community programs including a 'Family Farm' where kids can interact with animals, and provides packages for 'Paint & Pizza Party' and 'Golf Party' events.
